titleStmt.title: SII 38.377: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 377. (A.R. No. 377 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Vīraprātapa Achyutadēva Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1452, Vikruti, siṁha, śu 11 Friday, Anusham = irregular.

summary.p: It records that the ūravar of Māmaṇampākkam in Maṇḍakuḷa-nāḍu in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, Amarakōṉār, Kuḷattuḻār Chittiramēḻipparaiyar, and Mūvarāya-nāyakkar granted six hundred kuḻi of fallow land at Allāl-maṅgalam, freed from taxes, (as dēvadānam-sarvamānyam) to the god to conduct worship at Vasanthaṉ-maṇḍapam to the god in the temple of Tirumalaruḍaiyanayiṉār at Dēvakkāpuram, which was situated to the south of Seyyāṟu. It is stated that this charity was made for the merit of Tirumalai-Nāyakkar, Kāḷattisura-Nāyakkar, Mīṉāmmā Śivammaṉ, and Immaḍi Tirumalai-Nāyakkar. The temple was to reclaim the land and cultivate any crops. The members of the ūr, Amarakōṉār, and Kuḷattūḻār Chitramēḻiparaiyiar, the ūrkaṇakku, Koṇḍaiyyaṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhastiśrīRead śubhamastu svastiśrī maṉmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ Ariyairaāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvayirāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ Emmaṇṭalamum tiṟaikoṇṭa yiraācātirācaṉyirācaparamecuraṉ
kecataḷa vipāṭaṉ pātāḷapayaṅkaraṉ Aṭṭatikku maṉṉiya maṉopayaṅkaraṉ tulukka taḷavipāṭaṉ tulukka mokām tavittāṉ pūṟuvatekṣaṇa paccima Uttiracattacamuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟatāpa Accintiya tevamakāyirāyar
piṟutiviyirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 mel cellāniṉṟa vikuṟuti varuṣattu ciṅkanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu Ekāteciyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa Aṉuṣattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu maṇṭakuḷanāṭṭil ceyyāṟṟukku teṉpurivāyāṉa tevakkāpuram tirumalar Uṭaiya nayiṉāṟku yimmaṇṭalattu yikkoṭṭattu yippaṟṟil yiṉṉāṭṭil māmaṇampākkamūravar Amarakoṉār kuḷattuḻār cittirameḻipparaiyarum maṟṟum
Uḷyiṭṭa Ūravarum nāyakka(ā)rum muvarāyanāyakkarum Emmil yicaintu cuvāmi tirumalaināyakkar taṉmamākavum miṉāammā civammaṉ taṉmamākavum yimmaṭi tirumalaināyakkar taṉmamākavum kāḷatticura nāyakkar taṉmamākavum tirumalarThe letter ‘la’ is engraved below the line.Uṭaiyār vacantaṉ maṇṭapat
tukku taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi Eṅkaḷuril maṭuvukku vaṭakku
Allāḷamaṅkalattil Ellaittaṟuvāyil kollaimeṭṭil cāṟoṭi vaḷḷal Aṉāti taram pāyaṭṭirukkaiyil tāṅkalum veṭṭi tāṅkal kiḻ nilamum tirutti nañcai māvaṭai maravaṭai veṇṭum payiṟceyitu Aṉupavittuk koḷḷak kaṭavarākavum tāṅkaḷ veṇṭiṉa tāṅ
kal kamukku nañcainilattukku rām maṭuva karaikku vaṭakku tāḻampaḷḷam maṭuvukku kiḻakku maṭuniṅkalāka Aṇaikkaṭṭukku kiḻakku paṇicamakanThe letter ‘na’ is engraved below the line and read paṇimakanUḻutanilam niṅkalā Aṇaikkaṭṭukku kiḻakku Allāḷa maṅkalattil Ellaittaṟuvāy kuṟumpaviraṇaṉkuḷattukku teṟku Allāḷamaṅkalattil Ellai
ttaṟuvāy kaṭaikkūṭṭu nayiṉār tāṅkal kaṭaikkaḻaṉikku teṟku poykkarai peṭṭukku meṟku puṟṟukku meṟku cāṇāṭapparaiyaṉ puṟavaṭaiyil karampukku vaṭakku Amarakoṉār kaḻaṉiyiruḷaṉukku viṭṭa kiḻmelaippaṉta muṉiyiruḷaṉukku viṭṭu yitukku Uḷpaṭṭa nilam nayiṉār tirumalar Uṭaiya
nayiṉār vacantamaṇṭapa vupaiyattukku tevatāṉam caṟvamāṉiya(ma)māka cantirātittavaraiyum Aṉupavittukkoḷḷakkaṭaivatākavum yinta taṉmattukkku Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile kārām pacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ūravar nālu
peṟṟava nāṉum kuḻi pa ṇaka tavaṭaṭi nūṟu kuḻiyu toṭṭi yaḷukkuvai Āka yinta Aṟuṉūṟukuḻiyum māṉiyamāka cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattivara kaṭavarkaḷākavum kaṇakkapeṟu pāṭikāval kaṇmāḷaracu maiccūṭu Uṇṇa
tāmyiṭuvittu varakkaṭavarkaḷākavum yippaṭi cammatittu taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttom tirumalaruṭaiyanayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku māmaṇampākkam Ūravar Amarakoṉār kuḷattuḻār cittirameḻiparaiyar Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūravarom
yivai Amarakoṉār Eḻuttu yivai kuḷattuḻār Eḻuttu yivai cittirameḻiparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu yivai Ūṟkaṇakku koṇṭaiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.377 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
